# TASK_20260502_151641_closer_uaccess_attribution_probe validation batch
#
# Same eight closer workloads from record/closer_task_packet.md. The
# instrumentation added by this task is reporting-only; these commands must
# remain code-0 under the existing PRIVATE_DATA policy.

docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'printf alpha >/dev/null; echo kernel_read_done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'IFS= read -r line </etc/hostname; echo kernel_write_done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'a=seed; (; :); echo fork_private_done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'cat /etc/hostname; echo done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'echo alpha | cat; echo done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'wc -c /etc/hostname; echo done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm busybox sh -c 'echo alpha | wc -c; echo done'
docker run --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --rm -v /root/nacc_shm_repro:/nacc_shm_repro:ro busybox /nacc_shm_repro
